Uses of Class
org.episteme.social.psychology.social.Group

Packages that use Group
Package
Description
org.episteme.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.episteme.social.politics
Provides the org.episteme.social.politics module.
org.episteme.social.psychology.social
Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology.social module.

  • Uses of Group in org.episteme.social.economics

    Subclasses of Group in org.episteme.social.economics
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Bank
    Represents a banking institution capable of managing accounts and providing currency conversion services.
    class 
    Community
    Represents a primitive or cooperative social group where resources are shared.
    class 
    EarthEcosource
    A class representing the Earth as an autonomous organism that produces, stores, and recycles materials.
    class 
    Factory
    An organization specialized in mass production and transformation of resources.
    class 
    Holding
    An organization that owns and controls multiple other companies (organizations).
    class 
    Organization
    Represents a formal social and economic entity (Company, NGO, Government).

  • Uses of Group in org.episteme.social.politics

    Subclasses of Group in org.episteme.social.politics
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Administration
    Represents a state-managed administrative organization (agency, ministry, police, etc.).
    class 
    Nation
    Represents a sovereign nation or organized human group (modern tribe).
    class 
    PoliticalParty
    Represents a political party organized for democratic participation and governance.
    Methods in org.episteme.social.politics that return Group
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Group
    Settlement.getGroup()
    Returns the social group associated with this settlement.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Settlement(String name, Group group)
    Initializes a new Settlement.

  • Uses of Group in org.episteme.social.psychology.social

    Subclasses of Group in org.episteme.social.psychology.social
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Family
    Represents a nuclear or extended family group.
    class 
    HumanGroup
    Represents a group of human individuals (Homo Sapiens).
    class 
    Tribe
    Represents a human tribe, which is an organized human group with a distinct name and culture.
